title: True or False
description: Learn about booleans - the yes/no values that control program logic.

phases.title: What Are Booleans?
phases.description: Learn about True and False values

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: There's one more important type of variable - booleans!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: It's actually simple! A boolean can only be one of two values: True or False.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Think of it like a light switch - it's either ON (True) or OFF (False).

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Let's track if our crop is ready to harvest. Type: is_ready = True

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Notice that True starts with a capital T!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Perfect! Now is_ready is True - the crop is ready!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Now let's create another boolean. Let's say our basket is not empty. Type: is_empty = False

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Exactly! True = yes, False = no. Simple as that!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Here's something cool - comparisons automatically give you booleans!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Let's check if we have any crops. First, set: crop_count = 5

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Now let's check if crop_count is greater than 0. Type: has_crops = crop_count > 0

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: The > symbol means 'greater than'. This comparison gives us True or False!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Since 5 is greater than 0, has_crops is now True!

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: So the computer figured out if 5 > 0 is true or false?

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Exactly! Booleans are the foundation of making decisions in code!

phases.title: Run Your Code
phases.description: Execute to see booleans in action

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Let's print has_crops and run the code. Type: print(has_crops)

objectives.description: Click play to run your code

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Congratulations! You now know all the basic variable types!

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: Numbers, text, and true/false. Got it!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Time to put it all together in a challenge!
